name: Archive Downloader
description: Download files from archive.org items directly to your SD card over WiFi. Native UI rewrite.
author: Corey

changelog.v2.0.0: Complete rewrite in Go using the gabagool UI library (same UI stack as Pak Store): native list UI with automatic scrolling for long filenames, multi-select download queue with per-file progress and speed, no more screen flashing, built-in zip/7z/rar extraction, single binary replaces curl/jq/yq/7zz/minui tools. All v1.3 features ported: config.yml platforms, per-platform filters and extraction rules, on-device filter menu, search, cached file lists, favorites, arcade name mapping, archive.org login.
